name: Wizlite: Everybody loved RPGs
short_description: ⚔️ A Dungeon RPG You Can Enjoy in Just 15 Minutes! Dive into the depths with a Nostalgic party-based RPG—now reborn as a roguelite! 🆕 The latest update adds tons of dungeon cards and items, pushing your adventure even further!
detailed_description:
• Early Access Title

  • Player Count: Single-player

  • Music: Stream-safe soundtrack (can be used during streaming)

  • Languages: English, Japanese

A Dungeon RPG You Can Enjoy in Just 15 Minutes!

Classic party-based dungeon crawling, reimagined as a roguelite while keeping all the charm of old-school RPGs.

Wizlite redesigns the traditional, time-consuming RPG experience into something modern players can enjoy in short bursts.
Loot piles up, levels rise fast… and yes, you’ll be wiped out again and again.

How long can you survive in the depths?
Your choices will decide your fate!

“Just one more run” quickly turns into hours of play.
Dive in and experience the dangerously addictive adventure of Wizlite: Everybody loved RPGs!

Gameplay Features

An Adventure That Begins With Character Creation

At the start of each run, you’ll create your own original characters by choosing their race and class.
You’ll begin with a small party, but as you continue your adventures, new skills and permanent upgrades will gradually unlock.

Build your ideal party step by step, and challenge the dungeon’s deepest layers in pursuit of greater rewards and new experiences.

Card-Based Exploration That Changes Every Run

What awaits you next—a treasure chest, a trap, or a deadly foe?
In the dungeon, each step forward is decided by choosing from three cards, each leading to a different event or encounter.

This system brings constant tension and strategic depth, as every choice shapes your fate.
With new possibilities unfolding every time, no two adventures are ever the same.

Classic Turn-Based Command Battles

Combat in Wizlite uses the familiar command-style system that RPG fans know and love.

But this is far from simple nostalgia—paired with roguelite elements, every battle demands new tactics and careful decisions.

Exploit enemy weaknesses, turn the tide with scrolls and consumables, and discover surprising depth in a system that feels both classic and fresh.

Defeat Is Not the End—It Makes You Stronger!

Even if your entire party is wiped out, the adventure doesn’t end there.
The SP you’ve earned can be spent on permanent upgrades, giving you an edge in your next run.

With each attempt, your party grows stronger step by step.
This cycle of defeat, growth, and challenge is at the very heart of Wizlite.

Early Access Information

This is an Early Access version of Wizlite.
As we move toward full release, we’ll continue adding new cards, items, and gameplay features, expanding the adventure into an even deeper experience.

Your reviews and feedback will help shape the future of Wizlite.
Let’s build this ever-evolving RPG together!

⚠️ Please note: Balance changes and updates may result in save data not carrying over, especially SP values and unlocked upgrades.
🖱️ Keyboard input is only partially supported. For the best experience, we recommend playing with a mouse.

Prologue

At last, the party reached their destination—an ancient, decayed facility.
A corroded metal plate lay at the entrance, once a signboard, but now nearly unreadable.

“Wizlite is the oldest, and the most ● among the M ● ● ● ●● ● Games!”
“Form your party and venture into a dungeon swarming with monsters. Defeat the dragon at the deepest level!”
“…That’s awful. This is supposed to be the best game?” one mutters.
“Old or not, it is the oldest. Keep saying things like that and…”
“Let’s just go! That’s what we came here for.”
“Easy for you to say—we were dragged here…”

This strange band—different in looks, different in spirit—heads into the depths together.

⚠️This game is currently in Early Access and is still under development toward the full release.

As a result, save data may not carry over when updating directly from older versions.

Wizardry™ is a trademark of Drecom Co.,Ltd.
